function_definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.auto_assign_admin_role()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
BEGIN
  INSERT INTO public.user_roles (user_id, role)
  VALUES (NEW.id, 'admin')
  ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO NOTHING;
  RETURN NEW;
EXCEPTION
  WHEN OTHERS THEN
    -- Log error but don't fail user creation
    RAISE WARNING 'Failed to assign role for user %: %', NEW.id, SQLERRM;
    RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.auto_extract_and_insert_amount()
 RETURNS trigger
 LANGUAGE plpgsql
 SECURITY DEFINER
 SET search_path TO 'public'
AS $function$
DECLARE
    pattern_record RECORD;
    full_match TEXT;
    sign_char TEXT;
    matched_amount TEXT;
    cleaned_amount TEXT;
    final_amount NUMERIC;
    extraction_error_msg TEXT;
    is_debit BOOLEAN;
BEGIN
    -- Tìm regex pattern (enabled patterns only)
    SELECT * INTO pattern_record
    FROM app_regex_patterns
    WHERE enabled = TRUE
    LIMIT 1;
    
    -- Nếu không có pattern, skip
    IF pattern_record IS NULL THEN
        RETURN NEW;
    END IF;
    
    -- Thực hiện regex match trên body để lấy FULL MATCH
    BEGIN
        -- Pattern phải có dạng: ([+-])([\d,.]+)\s?(VND)
        -- Sử dụng regexp_matches để lấy groups
        SELECT 
            array_to_string(matches, '') INTO full_match
        FROM regexp_matches(NEW.body, pattern_record.regex_pattern, 'i') AS matches;
        
        IF full_match IS NOT NULL THEN
            -- Extract sign (group 1: + hoặc -)
            SELECT 
                matches[1] INTO sign_char
            FROM regexp_matches(NEW.body, pattern_record.regex_pattern, 'i') AS matches
            LIMIT 1;
            
            -- Extract amount (group 2: số tiền)
            SELECT 
                matches[2] INTO matched_amount
            FROM regexp_matches(NEW.body, pattern_record.regex_pattern, 'i') AS matches
            LIMIT 1;
            
            -- Xác định transaction type dựa vào sign
            is_debit := (sign_char = '+');
            
            IF matched_amount IS NOT NULL THEN
                -- Clean số tiền: loại bỏ dấu phẩy, dấu chấm
                cleaned_amount := regexp_replace(matched_amount, '[,.]', '', 'g');
                cleaned_amount := regexp_replace(cleaned_amount, '\s+', '', 'g');
                
                -- Convert sang numeric
                BEGIN
                    final_amount := cleaned_amount::NUMERIC;
                    
                    -- Insert vào bảng tương ứng
                    IF is_debit THEN
                        -- Tiền VÀO → debit_amount
                        INSERT INTO debit_amount (
                            notification_id,
                            amount,
                            currency,
                            extraction_status,
                            regex_pattern_id,
                            app_name,
                            package_name,
                            title,
                            body,
                            timestamp
                        ) VALUES (
                            NEW.id,
                            final_amount,
                            pattern_record.currency,
                            'success',
                            pattern_record.id,
                            NEW.app_name,
                            NEW.package_name,
                            NEW.title,
                            NEW.body,
                            NEW.timestamp
                        );
                    ELSE
                        -- Tiền RA → credit_amount
                        INSERT INTO credit_amount (
                            notification_id,
                            amount,
                            currency,
                            extraction_status,
                            regex_pattern_id,
                            app_name,
                            package_name,
                            title,
                            body,
                            timestamp
                        ) VALUES (
                            NEW.id,
                            final_amount,
                            pattern_record.currency,
                            'success',
                            pattern_record.id,
                            NEW.app_name,
                            NEW.package_name,
                            NEW.title,
                            NEW.body,
                            NEW.timestamp
                        );
                    END IF;
                    
                EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN
                    -- Nếu convert failed, insert với error
                    extraction_error_msg := 'Invalid number format: ' || matched_amount;
                    
                    IF is_debit THEN
                        INSERT INTO debit_amount (
                            notification_id,
                            amount,
                            currency,
                            extraction_status,
                            extraction_error,
                            regex_pattern_id,
                            app_name,
                            package_name,
                            title,
                            body,
                            timestamp
                        ) VALUES (
                            NEW.id,
                            0,
                            pattern_record.currency,
                            'failed',
                            extraction_error_msg,
                            pattern_record.id,
                            NEW.app_name,
                            NEW.package_name,
                            NEW.title,
                            NEW.body,
                            NEW.timestamp
                        );
                    ELSE
                        INSERT INTO credit_amount (
                            notification_id,
                            amount,
                            currency,
                            extraction_status,
                            extraction_error,
                            regex_pattern_id,
                            app_name,
                            package_name,
                            title,
                            body,
                            timestamp
                        ) VALUES (
                            NEW.id,
                            0,
                            pattern_record.currency,
                            'failed',
                            extraction_error_msg,
                            pattern_record.id,
                            NEW.app_name,
                            NEW.package_name,
                            NEW.title,
                            NEW.body,
                            NEW.timestamp
                        );
                    END IF;
                END;
            END IF;
        END IF;
        
    EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS THEN
        -- Regex error - không insert gì cả, chỉ log
        RAISE NOTICE 'Regex error for notification %: %', NEW.id, SQLERRM;
    END;
    
    RETURN NEW;
END;
$function$
description: Automatically extracts amount from notification and inserts into debit_amount (for +) or credit_amount (for -)

function_definition:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.get_user_role(uid uuid)
 RETURNS text
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
  SELECT role FROM user_roles WHERE user_id = uid;
$function$

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.is_admin(uid uuid)
 RETURNS boolean
 LANGUAGE sql
 STABLE SECURITY DEFINER
AS $function$
  SELECT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM user_roles 
    WHERE user_id = uid AND role = 'admin'
  );
$function$

description: Sends Telegram notifications to multiple chat IDs (up to 5) when debit/credit transactions occur. Loops through telegram_chat_id array.
